import os, shutil
src = 'checkpoints_boost2'
dst = 'checkpoints'
for f in os.listdir(src):
    if f.endswith('.best.zip'):
        env = f.replace('.best.zip','')
        sp = os.path.join(src, f)
        dp = os.path.join(dst, env + '.zip')
        shutil.copy(sp, dp)
        print(f'copied {sp} -> {dp}')
